project.name: AI Teaching Assistant
project.description: Hệ thống tạo bài giảng tự động sử dụng AI (Gemini, Imagen, TTS) để generate PPTX, handouts, và quizzes từ outline

critical_rules.⛔ NO_AUTO_PUSH: TUYỆT ĐỐI không được git push khi chưa được user bảo. Chỉ commit local, chờ user xác nhận rồi mới push.

cliproxy.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy for free AI tier access
cliproxy.admin_config: system_configs table (cliproxy.enabled, cliproxy.url, cliproxy.apiKey, cliproxy.defaultTextModel, cliproxy.defaultImageModel, cliproxy.defaultTTSModel)

tts: ViTTS OmniVoice (3 modes: auto/clone/design, async job polling)

text_normalization.architecture: DB-only (all 17K+ entries in TTSDictionary table, loaded to Python cache via /reload-dictionaries)
text_normalization.status: DISABLED in v1.1.1 — causes audio quality degradation (mispronounced words). TTS optimization now handled by AI prompt (NHIỆM VỤ 3 in optimize-notes). Code remains for future re-enabling after dictionary improvement.

tables.name: slides
tables.description: Structured slide data (NEW - replaces slideScript TEXT)

tables.name: slide_audios
tables.description: Audio per slide - stores OPTIMIZED speaker notes (Step 4 Bước 2). Slide.speakerNote = raw, SlideAudio.speakerNote = optimized

tables.name: interactive_questions
tables.description: MC/MR questions for focus checking during lesson (NEW)

tables.name: api_keys
tables.description: Encrypted API keys for AI services

tables.name: model_configs
tables.description: User AI model preferences per task (TaskType: OUTLINE, SLIDES, SPEAKER_NOTES, QUESTIONS, IMAGE, TTS)

tables.name: tts_dictionaries
tables.description: TTS pronunciation dictionary — DB-only source of truth (17K+ entries from vietnormalizer + admin/user custom). Loaded to Python service cache on NestJS startup.

slides: GET /lessons/:id/slides - ⭐ Returns Slide[] entities (Step 5 data persistence)
pptx: GET /lessons/:id/pptx/generate-images - SSE stream for image generation
user_templates: GET /user/templates - Get user's personal PPTX templates
POST /user/templates/upload - Upload a personal PPTX template
text_normalizer_python: POST /normalize - Normalize text (uses cached DB dicts + user overrides)
POST /reload-dictionaries - Reload all system dicts from NestJS to Python cache
prompts: GET /prompts/active/:slug - Get active prompt by slug

prompt_composer.buildFullPrompt(subjectId, slug, vars): Role (from Subject) + Task (from DB) - used for outline, slides, questions
prompt_composer.buildTaskOnlyPrompt(slug, vars): Task prompt only - used for slides.design, slides.image

steps.name: Kịch Bản Slide (no speaker notes)
steps.note: Speaker notes removed from Step 3 UI, now exclusively in Step 4

steps.name: Tạo Audio (2-step speaker notes)
sub_steps: Bước 1: Tạo lời giảng (slides.speaker-notes prompt) → saves to Slide.speakerNote
Bước 2: Tối ưu & kiểm duyệt (slides.optimize-notes prompt) → saves to SlideAudio.speakerNote
Bước 3: Tạo audio TTS từ optimized note

features.name: TTS Integration
features.notes: Gemini + Google Cloud + Vbee + ViTTS OmniVoice (3 modes: auto/clone/design)

features.name: ViTTS OmniVoice Rewrite
features.notes: Rewrote vitts-tts.provider.ts to use OmniVoice async API with job polling. 3 modes: auto (no voice needed), clone (ref_id from voice library), design (instruct text like 'female, young adult, high pitch'). Frontend TTSSelector has mode tabs UI. Uncommitted changes.

features.name: Lesson Workflow (6 steps)
features.description: All 6 steps working with DB prompts and PromptComposer integration

features.name: AI Model Configuration
features.description: Multi-source model discovery: Admin test endpoint fetches models from BOTH CLIProxy (/v1/models) AND Gemini SDK (generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models). Uses DB system API key (ApiKeysService) for Gemini, not .env. Models categorized by type (text/image/tts) and source (CLIProxy/Gemini SDK). Frontend displays [Source] model_name format. CLIProxy models listed first. No hardcoded model defaults anywhere — all auto-detected. TaskTypes: OUTLINE, SLIDES, SPEAKER_NOTES, QUESTIONS, IMAGE, TTS.

features.name: Structured Slides
features.description: SlideDataModule with parser, CRUD API, auto-parse after Gemini generation

features.name: Interactive Questions
features.description: MC/MR questions using questions.interactive prompt from DB via PromptComposer

features.name: Review Questions (Bloom)
features.description: 3-level taxonomy: Biết, Hiểu, Vận dụng - uses questions.review prompt from DB

features.name: Prompt System
features.description: Database-driven prompts with seedV2() sync. PromptComposer combines Role + Task prompts.

features.name: Lesson Management
features.description: Edit (rename) and delete lessons with confirmation modals. Delete cascades to slides, audio, questions.

features.name: Speaker Notes Model Selection
features.description: SPEAKER_NOTES task type added to TaskType enum, ModelConfigService, and frontend ModelSelector. Users can select independent AI model for speaker note generation in Step 4.

features.name: Interactive Question Answer Editing
features.description: Edit button in Step 6 now allows modifying answer text (not just question text). Answers sent to backend via PUT with answers[] array.

features.name: Admin Prompt Editor UI
features.description: Widened prompt edit modal (50vw), monospace font for content textarea. Uses .prompt-modal class to override UserSettings.css conflicts.

features.name: Two-Step Speaker Notes
features.description: Step 4 now has 2 buttons: (1) Tạo Lời Giảng (raw content generation, saved to Slide.speakerNote), (2) Tối Ưu & Kiểm Duyệt (QA + language cleanup + TTS optimization, saved to SlideAudio.speakerNote). 3-column UI shows raw vs optimized comparison.

features.name: PPTX Optimized Notes Priority
features.description: PPTX export now prioritizes SlideAudio.speakerNote (optimized) over Slide.speakerNote (raw). Falls back to raw if no optimized version exists.

features.name: Optimize Prompt v3 (Hybrid)
features.description: slides.optimize-notes prompt redesigned: structural preservation rules (keep narrative, no sentence deletion, >=95% word count) + pattern-based language cleanup (metaphors, hyperbole, literary). TTS NHIỆM VỤ 3 fully REMOVED - VietNormalizer handles all TTS normalization.

features.name: VietNormalizer TTS Integration
features.description: DB-only dictionary (17K+ words from vietnormalizer + custom). Python service caches dicts loaded via /reload-dictionaries on NestJS startup. Admin/User UI for dictionary CRUD. Auto-normalizes numbers, dates, units, acronyms, non-Vietnamese words before TTS.

features.name: Admin TTS Dictionary Page
features.description: Dedicated admin page at /admin/tts-dictionary with sidebar nav item. TTSDictionaryManager component with search, add/edit/delete, CSV import/export.

features.name: Multi-Source Model Discovery (Admin)
features.description: Admin Settings Test Connection discovers models from CLIProxy AND Gemini SDK simultaneously. Returns categorized {text, image, tts} with {id, source} objects. Gemini API key fetched from DB (isSystem=true) via ApiKeysService, not process.env. Deduplicates models across sources.

features.name: Synchronized [Source] Model Labels
features.description: All model selectors (admin Settings, user Steps 2-6, TTSSelector) display models in [Source] model_name format. CLIProxy models shown first (blue badge), Gemini SDK second (green badge). No hardcoded model names anywhere in frontend or backend.

interactive_question.purpose: Kiểm tra tập trung trong suốt bài giảng
interactive_question.answers: Tối đa 10, đáp án đúng có dấu *
interactive_question.export_format: 11 cột (Question Type, Text, Answer 1-6, Correct Feedback, Incorrect Feedback, Points)

review_question.purpose: Ôn tập cuối bài theo Bloom taxonomy
review_question.export_format: 7 cột (Question ID, Question, Correct Answer (A), Option B, Option C, Option D, Explanation)
review_question.ui_note: Mức độ column removed from both UI table and Excel export

patterns: React Context for lesson editor state
⭐ PromptComposer: Role (system.role + Subject) + Task (from DB slug)
⭐ seedV2() in prompts.service.ts keeps DB and code in sync
Dynamic model discovery with API classification
refreshLessonDataOnly() pattern - refresh data without overwriting step state
Async job polling pattern: submit job → poll status endpoint → download result (ViTTS OmniVoice)
Mode-based TTS synthesis: switch/case on vittsMode(auto/clone/design) in provider.synthesize()
Auto-detect ViTTS mode from modelName format: vitts:ref:UUID→clone, vitts:design→design, vitts:auto→auto
gotchas: Gemini output format: **Slide N: Title** with **[Speaker Notes]:**
Prisma 7 requires typescript 5.5+
SlideAudio table deprecated - use Slide.audioUrl instead
TTSResult uses .audio (not .buffer) and .durationMs
FileStorageService path: datauser/{userId}/lessons/{lessonId}/audio/
JWT returns {id, email, role} - use req.user.id NOT req.user.userId
API response handling: check if response.data is array or object
TypeScript decorator metadata: use 'any' type for @Req() to avoid TS1272 error
⭐ Image model name: 'gemini-2.5-flash-image' NOT 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image-generation' (404 error)
⭐ Image SDK: Use @google/genai (new) NOT @google/generative-ai (legacy) for image generation
⭐ Image generation: Use client.models.generateContentStream() with config.responseModalities=['IMAGE','TEXT']
⭐ Browser tags cannot send JWT headers - use public route /files/public/... for images
⭐ Vite proxy: Add '/files' proxy to forward static file requests to backend port 3001
⭐ GEMINI_API_KEY must be in .env for image generation fallback when user has no key in DB
⭐ buildFullPrompt for questions (needs role) vs buildTaskOnlyPrompt for design/image (no role needed)
⭐ Prompt variables: {title}, {slide_script}, {detailed_outline}, {raw_outline}, {lesson_id}
⭐ Always sync prompts.service.ts seedV2() when updating prompts in DB to prevent data loss
⭐ ExcelJS import: Use 'import * as ExcelJS from exceljs' (static), NOT 'await import()' (dynamic fails)
⭐ InteractiveQuestion answers: DB has answer1-10 fields, backend transforms to answers[] array for frontend
⭐ Excel export: Use api.get() with responseType:'blob', create download link via URL.createObjectURL()
⭐ Step 5 API split: GET /slides returns Slide[] entities, GET /slides/script-data returns lesson metadata
⭐ Template background paths: URLs like /files/public/system/templates/{uuid}/... map to datauser/system/templates/{uuid}/...
⭐ getLocalPath() in pptx.service.ts: Must handle BOTH /templates/... AND /files/public/.../templates/... URL patterns
⭐ Template image UI: Needs dedicated routes in file-storage.controller.ts to serve background images for previews
⭐ ViTTS voice ID normalization: Strip 'vitts:' prefix before sending to API - voice format is 'ref:3', 'trained_xxx', or 'male'
⭐ ViTTS synthesize-with-saved-ref endpoint: Use form-urlencoded (URLSearchParams), NOT JSON body - API returns 422 with JSON
⭐ ViTTS multilingualMode: Optional param for handling mixed Vietnamese/English text - values: 'auto', 'syllable', 'english'
⭐ ViTTS API response parsing: /saved-references and /trained-voices return arrays directly, NOT nested {data:[]} objects
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Requires Node 22+ (not 20), OpenSSL on Alpine, binaryTargets: ['native', 'linux-musl-openssl-3.0.x']
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Remove 'url' from schema.prisma datasource - must use prisma.config.ts
🐳 Prisma Migration: Dockerfile CMD phải chạy 'npx prisma migrate deploy' TRƯỚC 'node dist/src/main'. Nếu không, enum mới (vd SPEAKER_NOTES) sẽ không có trong DB production
🐳 Prisma Migration: Mỗi khi thêm enum value vào schema.prisma, PHẢI tạo migration file (prisma migrate dev --name xxx). Nếu quên → DB production sẽ lỗi
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Create dummy .env with DATABASE_URL during build for prisma generate
🐳 NestJS Dockerfile: CMD uses 'dist/src/main' NOT 'dist/main' - check TypeScript output path
🐳 Docker Compose: ports: '3001:3001' REQUIRED to expose backend - different from PORT env var in container
🐳 Vite production: VITE_API_URL baked at BUILD time - use nginx proxy /api/ for runtime flexibility
🐳 Frontend nginx proxy: Add location /api/ { proxy_pass http://backend:3001/; } for API routing
🐳 Watchtower: Fails on older Docker (API version 1.25 vs 1.44) - remove and use manual docker compose pull
🚀 GHCR login: echo 'PAT_TOKEN' | docker login ghcr.io -u username --password-stdin
🚀 GitHub Actions: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/project/service:branch format for image tags
⭐ refreshLessonDataOnly(): Refresh lesson data WITHOUT overwriting currentStep - prevents navigation resets when Step 3+ calls refresh
⭐ CSS class scoping: .delete-btn in Subjects.css uses position:absolute (for subject cards). Must scope with .subject-card .delete-btn to avoid overriding lesson card .delete-btn
⭐ Model Discovery (CLIProxy): Default-include ALL models for text tasks. Only skip embedding/moderation. Old code filtered by keyword (flash/pro/gemini/claude) which excluded GPT models

⭐ Model Discovery (Gemini): Use fetch() to https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=... to dynamically list models. Merge with KNOWN_GEMINI_MODELS for display names. Fallback to static list if API fails
⭐ Review Question Prompt: Must explicitly prohibit citation phrases like 'Theo bài giảng', 'Trong bài học' etc. Add negative constraints in prompt for LLM compliance
⭐ CSS class conflict: UserSettings.css defines .modal-content {max-width:420px} which overrides AdminPage.css. Solution: Add specific class (.prompt-modal) with !important
⭐ Speaker notes prompt: Avoid rhetorical questions in examples (ĐÚNG section). Use declarative transition sentences instead
⭐ Interactive question editing: answers[] array uses * prefix for correct answers. When editing, preserve prefix. Send full answers array in PUT request
⭐ Excel export filename: Use Content-Disposition header on backend + link.setAttribute('download') on frontend for custom filenames
⭐ Two-step speaker notes: Slide.speakerNote = raw (Bước 1), SlideAudio.speakerNote = optimized (Bước 2). optimizeSpeakerNotes() only updates SlideAudio, preserves Slide.speakerNote
⭐ PPTX speaker note source: pptx.service.ts prioritizes SlideAudio.speakerNote (optimized) → falls back to Slide.speakerNote (raw)

⭐ Optimize prompt pitfall: Telling AI to 'viết lại' or 'rửa ngôn ngữ' causes it to compress narrative→bullet lists (30-56% content loss). Must use 'sửa cụm từ, giữ nguyên câu' approach with >=95% word count constraint
⭐ TTS abbreviation rules: VN abbr (CLB)→full VN (câu lạc bộ), EN abbr with VN meaning (EOL)→VN (ký tự cuối dòng), other EN abbr (RAM)→keep as-is. NEVER spell out letter-by-letter (R A M)
⭐ app.py encoding: Vietnamese strings in Python dicts must not be split across lines - causes SyntaxError
⭐ VietNormalizer: Clone repo locally to pptx_generator/vietnormalizer/ — use sys.path import, no pip install needed
⭐ VietNormalizer DB-only: All 17K+ entries in TTSDictionary table. Python /reload-dictionaries caches them. Per-request only sends user overrides
⭐ VietNormalizer custom dict bug: Creating new VietnameseNormalizer(custom_path=...) REPLACES built-in 17K dict. Must merge dicts instead
⭐ Uvicorn --reload with git repos: --reload-exclude flag broken on Windows with .git dirs. Use non-reload mode or exclude dir
⭐ TTSDictionary import: prisma/import-vietnormalizer-csv.ts — batch inserts of 500, parses acronyms.csv + non-vietnamese-words.csv
⭐ TextNormalizerService OnModuleInit: Pushes all system dicts to Python /reload-dictionaries on startup. Reloads after admin CRUD (create/update/delete)

⭐ Admin model discovery: Do NOT use process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY for Gemini model listing — key is stored encrypted in DB (api_keys table, isSystem=true). Use ApiKeysService.getActiveKey('__system__', 'GEMINI') to decrypt

⭐ Model defaults: system-config.service.ts and cliproxy.provider.ts use '' (empty string) as fallback, NOT hardcoded model names. If admin hasn't configured, getDefaultForTask() provides dynamic defaults from CLIProxy config or DEFAULT_MODELS constant

⭐ Admin test endpoint categorization: CLIProxy models from /v1/models (OpenAI format: data[].id), Gemini SDK models from /v1beta/models (Google format: models[].name with 'models/' prefix to strip). Skip embedding/retrieval/aqa/moderation models

⭐ ModelSelector.tsx source tagging: Tag models with source='CLIProxy' or source='Gemini SDK' DURING fetch, not from backend. Backend discover endpoint returns {GEMINI:[], CLIPROXY:[]}, frontend maps to source field

⭐ Settings.tsx categorizedModels state: Admin dropdowns use { text: {id,source}[], image: {id,source}[], tts: {id,source}[] } from /admin/config/cliproxy/test endpoint. Format: [Source] model_id in <select> options
⭐ CLIProxy TTS modalities: Must use UPPERCASE 'AUDIO' in modalities array AND generationConfig.responseModalities. Lowercase 'audio' causes Gemini to default to TEXT modality → 400 error

⭐ CLIProxy TTS response format: Audio data returned in message.images[].image_url.url as data URI (data:audio/L16;codec=pcm;rate=24000;base64,...). NOT in message.audio.data (OpenAI format) or inline_data (Gemini format)

⭐ CLIProxy TTS model name: CLIProxy /v1/models returns ALIASES (display names like 'Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview TTS'). Config must use actual model ID 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts'. User/admin config may have 'cliproxy:' prefix — strip before API call
⭐ CLIProxy TTS fallback: When CLIProxy TTS fails, tts.service.ts falls back to Gemini SDK. MUST override dto.model to 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts' — CLIProxy display name is invalid for Gemini SDK
⭐ CLIProxy TTS generationConfig: Add speechConfig.voiceConfig.prebuiltVoiceConfig.voiceName alongside OpenAI-format audio.voice to ensure CLIProxy forwards voice config correctly to Gemini API
conventions: Prisma map() for snake_case in DB
Frontend pages in src/pages/, components in src/components/

prompt_slugs.system.role: Vai trò giảng viên - được kết hợp với Subject fields
prompt_slugs.outline.detailed: Step 2 - Tạo dàn bài chi tiết từ raw outline (JSON với learningGuide, situation, sections, reviewQuestions)
prompt_slugs.slides.script: Step 3 - Tạo kịch bản slide (20-30 slides, slideIndex từ 1)
prompt_slugs.slides.speaker-notes: Step 4 Bước 1 - Tạo lời giảng RAW (Hook→Explain→Bridge, tối thiểu 200 từ/slide content)
prompt_slugs.slides.optimize-notes: Step 4 Bước 2 - Tối ưu & kiểm duyệt: giữ cấu trúc narrative, sửa ẩn dụ/cường điệu. TTS NHIỆM VỤ 3 đã bị XÓA — VietNormalizer xử lý TTS normalization ở bước sau
prompt_slugs.slides.design: Step 5 - Tối ưu content (2-5 bullets, emoji học thuật, description ≤12 từ)
prompt_slugs.slides.image: Step 5 - Tạo prompt cho Imagen (educational illustration style)
prompt_slugs.questions.interactive: Step 6 - 5 câu hỏi kiểm tra tập trung (MC/MR)

slides.script.slide_count: 20-30 slides (1 title + 1 agenda + 1 objectives + 15-18 content + 1 questions + 1 summary)
slides.script.speakerNote_structure: Direct opening (no dramatic hooks) → Explain → Bridge
speakerNote_rules: Giọng văn = giảng viên bình thường (KHÔNG MC, diễn giả, YouTuber)
Xưng hô: 'các em' cho sinh viên đại học
Mở đầu slide: 1 câu ngắn đơn giản, nối tiếp slide trước

optimize_tasks.NV1: CHUẨN HÓA GIỌNG VĂN (ưu tiên cao nhất)
optimize_tasks.NV3: TỐI ƯU CHO TTS (code→lời nói, viết tắt, toán tử)

slides.design.golden_rule: Định nghĩa/khái niệm → giữ nguyên văn, emoji + point để trống
